paper_focus.title: Low-Density Steels: Complex Metallurgy for Automotive Applications
paper_focus.research_objective: To elucidate the complex metallurgical phenomena induced by high aluminum additions in steels and evaluate the weight-saving potential of two low-density steel families for automotive applications through thermodynamic modeling, microstructural characterization, and mechanical performance assessment.
main_process_variables: Finite-element crash simulation conditions (EuroNCAP, piecewise linear plasticity)
